home.1.header.title: How does it work?
home.1.header.subtitle: The whole process is simple and safe — you risk nothing, I take on all the upfront work.
home.1.steps.0.title: You tell me about your business
home.1.steps.0.description: You fill in a short form: what you do, what you like, what you need.
home.1.steps.1.title: I design it
home.1.steps.1.description: I prepare a complete website — with copy, colors and a layout tailored to your industry.
home.1.steps.2.title: You see the finished result
home.1.steps.2.description: You get a link to the finished website. You share your feedback and I make the changes.
home.1.steps.3.title: You pay and we launch
home.1.steps.3.description: Only once you like the website do you pay — and we publish it under your domain.
home.2.header.title: One person. From idea to launch.
home.2.story.content:
Hi, I'm Kuba — I design and code websites for small businesses and one-person companies. I do everything myself: from the first sketch, through the copy, to publishing. You have one contact and one person responsible for the whole thing.

I came up with the "result first, payment later" model because I don't like buying blind either. I'd rather show you the finished website and let it speak for itself.
home.2.stats.0.label: websites delivered
home.2.stats.1.label: from request to launch
home.2.stats.2.label: payment after approval
home.3.header.title: Websites I build
home.3.header.subtitle: For every industry I have a polished starting point that I tailor to your business.
home.3.templateItems.0.name: Nowak Law Firm
home.3.templateItems.0.description: Confident legal support for you and your company — a calm, expert website for a law firm.
home.3.templateItems.1.name: ElektroMax
home.3.templateItems.1.description: Electrical work with no surprises — a focused services website with a quote within 24 h.
home.3.templateItems.2.name: Trattoria Rosa
home.3.templateItems.2.description: Italian cuisine in the heart of the city — an atmospheric website with a menu and table booking.
home.3.footnote: …and every other industry — just ask about yours
home.4.header.title: From three sentences to a website
home.4.header.subtitle: Paweł wrote me three sentences about his business. Four days later he had a website that started ringing the phone.
home.4.quote.text: I run an electrical company, ElektroMax, near Wrocław. I mostly do installations in homes and electrical measurements. I'd like a simple website so clients can quickly call and see what I do. Colors? Maybe something energetic.
home.4.quote.author: That's the whole request — I did the rest
home.4.imageDescription.name: elektromax.pl — after 4 days
home.4.items.0.title: A website that works
home.4.items.0.description: Before, there was just a Google Business profile and a number on the van. After launch, the form and phone started bringing in inquiries that same week.
home.4.caseStudies.1.quote.text: I run a small law office in Poznań — mostly family and labour law. I need a trustworthy site where clients can read about my services and book a consultation. Keep it calm and professional.
home.4.caseStudies.1.quote.author: A short brief — the rest was on me
home.4.caseStudies.1.items.0.title: Consultations booked online
home.4.caseStudies.1.items.0.description: The old contact was a phone number nobody answered during hearings. Now the booking form fills the calendar and filters out the wrong cases before the first call.
home.4.caseStudies.2.quote.text: We opened a small Italian bistro in the old town. We'd love a warm site with the menu, photos and an easy way to reserve a table. Something that feels like the place.
home.4.caseStudies.2.quote.author: That was the whole email — I took it from there
home.4.caseStudies.2.items.0.title: Tables reserved every evening
home.4.caseStudies.2.items.0.description: Before, reservations meant answering the phone mid-service. Online booking now fills the evenings and the menu page cut repeat questions in half.
home.5.header.title: What clients say
home.5.header.subtitle: Each of these people first saw the finished website — and then decided to pay.
home.5.items.0.title: Marta W.
home.5.items.0.description: I didn't believe I'd see the website before paying. I saw it — and knew right away I wanted it.
home.5.items.1.title: Paweł K.
home.5.items.1.description: I sent a few sentences about my company, and a week later I had a website better than the competition.
home.5.items.2.title: Ania & Tomek
home.5.items.2.description: Menu, bookings, photos — all sorted. Guests praise the website more often than the dessert.

home.10.blogPosts.0.title: A company website in 2026 — what does it really need?
home.10.blogPosts.0.description: Five elements without which a local business website won't turn visits into phone calls.
home.10.blogPosts.1.title: Why I show the website before I send the invoice

home.11.header.title: Frequently asked questions
home.11.header.subtitle: And if you don't find your answer — just drop me a line.
home.11.faqItems.0.question: Do I really pay nothing upfront?
home.11.faqItems.0.answer: Yes. I prepare the website design at my own risk. You only pay once you see the finished website and decide you want it.
home.11.faqItems.1.question: How long does it take to prepare the design?
home.11.faqItems.1.answer: Usually 3–5 business days from receiving the information about your business.
home.11.faqItems.2.question: What if I don't like the design?
home.11.faqItems.2.answer: I make changes based on your feedback. And if it's still not "the one" — we part ways at no cost.
home.11.faqItems.3.question: Will the website be fully mine?
home.11.faqItems.3.answer: Yes — once paid, you get full rights. I also help with the domain and hosting.
home.12.header.title: Your website is closer than you think.
home.12.header.subtitle: See your finished website for free — and pay only when you say "I'll take it".
home.13.header.title: See your website — for free
home.13.header.subtitle: Write a few sentences about your business. Within a few days I'll get back to you with a link to the finished design of your website. No obligations.
